evals.name: happy-path-effort-estimation
evals.prompt: Estimate the effort for migrating our legacy ERP to a cloud-native platform
evals.expected_output: WBS with effort drivers, team composition model, magnitude framing in FTE-months, and risk-adjusted timeline with disclaimer
expectations: Produces WBS with effort drivers per feature
Team composition uses roles and quantities, not rates
Magnitude framed in FTE-months, not dollar amounts

evals.name: edge-case-greenfield-no-history
evals.prompt: Size a brand new product with no comparable projects in our history
evals.expected_output: Uses reference-class forecasting with wider ranges and flags high uncertainty

evals.name: happy-path-cost-drivers
evals.prompt: Identify all cost drivers for a microservices modernization project
evals.expected_output: Cost driver taxonomy covering personnel, licensing, infrastructure, tooling, training, migration, compliance, contingency, and opportunity
expectations: Each driver has magnitude and phase impact

evals.name: false-positive-final-price-request
evals.prompt: How much will this project cost in dollars?
evals.expected_output: Redirects: identifies drivers and magnitude but explicitly refuses to produce a final price
expectations: Explains separation of costing from pricing

evals.name: edge-case-regulatory-heavy
evals.prompt: Estimate effort for a healthcare platform that must comply with HIPAA and SOC 2
evals.expected_output: Includes compliance driver with 20-40% additional testing effort buffer
expectations: Identifies compliance as major cost driver
Includes certification and audit costs as drivers
